metadata.title: AI Baby Image Generator
metadata.description: Turn any photo into an adorable AI baby in 8 artistic styles, then bring it to life with the BabyBoogey dance video generator.

page.title: AI Baby Image Generator
page.description: Upload a reference photo or describe your dream baby and pick a style — we'll handle the rest.

generator.title: Baby Image Generator
generator.description: Pick a style, optionally upload a reference photo, and generate in seconds.

form.prompt_placeholder: E.g. smiling baby with curly hair, holding a yellow flower, soft window light
form.prompt_too_long: Prompt is too long, please shorten it
form.reference_image_placeholder: Upload one baby photo for the best likeness
form.reference_hint: Upload a clear baby photo for best likeness. Skip it to generate purely from your description.
form.some_images_failed_to_upload: Upload failed, please remove and retry

status.pending: Waiting for the model to start

errors.timeout: Generation timed out, please try again
errors.insufficient_credits: Not enough credits. Top up to keep creating.
errors.need_prompt_or_photo: Add a prompt or upload a reference photo first
errors.empty_result: The model returned no images, please retry
errors.create_task_failed: Failed to create baby image task
errors.handoff_failed: Could not transfer this image to the video generator

dance_handoff.banner_description: We pre-loaded the image you just created. Pick a dance template and generate your video.
